<!-- source-hash: 1cae7f2c0878235a832f9b8a2bad3dd5 -->
REST controller exposing the `/api/v1/devices` endpoint for device management operations within the OpenFrame platform, including paginated listing, single-device retrieval, filter option discovery, and status updates.

## Key Components

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `getDevices` | `GET /api/v1/devices` | Paginated, filterable device list with optional tag loading |
| `getDevice` | `GET /api/v1/devices/{machineId}` | Single device lookup with tags by machine ID |
| `getDeviceFilters` | `GET /api/v1/devices/filters` | Available filter facets with counts |
| `updateDeviceStatus` | `PATCH /api/v1/devices/{machineId}` | Sets device status to `DELETED` or `ARCHIVED` |

**Dependencies:**
- `DeviceService` — core device queries and status updates
- `DeviceFilterService` — async filter aggregation
- `TagService` — tag resolution per machine
- `DeviceMapper` — maps domain objects to API response DTOs

## Usage Example

```java
// GET /api/v1/devices?statuses=ONLINE&limit=50&sortField=hostname&sortDirection=ASC&includeTags=true
// Returns paginated DevicesResponse with tag data per device

// GET /api/v1/devices/mch-abc123
// Returns DeviceResponse with full detail and associated tags

// GET /api/v1/devices/filters?osTypes=Windows&organizationIds=org-1
// Returns DeviceFilterResponse with available filter counts

// PATCH /api/v1/devices/mch-abc123
// Body: { "status": "ARCHIVED" }
// Returns 204 No Content
```

**Filtering parameters supported on list/filter endpoints:**
- `statuses`, `deviceTypes`, `osTypes`, `organizationIds`, `tagKeys`, `tagValues`
- Cursor-based pagination via `cursor` + `limit` (1–100, default 20)
- Sort by `hostname`, `displayName`, `status`, or `lastSeen`
